title: centunculus arvensis
intro: Centunculus arvensis, also known as corn chamomile, is a perennial plant in the primrose family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in soothing skin irritations, wounds, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of corn chamomile include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve anxiety and insomnia, and promote wound healing. Corn chamomile can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
